# kemp_sso_domain (Data Source)

Reads an existing Kemp LoadMaster SSO authentication domain by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read an existing SSO domain to reference its settings
data "kemp_sso_domain" "corp" {
  name = "corp.example.com"
}

output "corp_auth_type" {
  value = data.kemp_sso_domain.corp.auth_type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Domain name to look up (e.g. `example.com`).

### Read-Only

- `auth_type` (String)
- `cert_check_asi` (Boolean)
- `cert_check_cn` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `idp_cert` (String)
- `idp_entity_id` (String)
- `idp_logoff_url` (String)
- `idp_match_cert` (Boolean)
- `idp_sso_url` (String)
- `kcd_username` (String)
- `kerberos_domain` (String)
- `kerberos_kdc` (String)
- `ldap_admin` (String)
- `ldap_endpoint` (String)
- `ldap_endpoint_health_check` (Boolean)
- `logon_domain` (String)
- `logon_fmt` (String)
- `logon_fmt2` (String)
- `logon_transcode` (Boolean)
- `max_failed_auths` (Number)
- `oidc_app_id` (String)
- `oidc_auth_ep_url` (String)
- `oidc_logoff_url` (String)
- `oidc_redirect_uri` (String)
- `oidc_token_ep_url` (String)
- `radius_nas_id` (String)
- `radius_send_nas_id` (Boolean)
- `reset_fail_tout` (Number)
- `server` (String)
- `server_side` (Boolean)
- `sess_tout_duration_priv` (Number)
- `sess_tout_duration_pub` (Number)
- `sess_tout_idle_priv` (Number)
- `sess_tout_idle_pub` (Number)
- `sess_tout_type` (String)
- `sp_cert` (String)
- `sp_entity_id` (String)
- `unblock_tout` (Number)
- `user_acc_control` (Number)
